target: 2. Boundaries
Ginjiro Nezu
Where are you going!?
...You, huh... Ushio...!!
It's dangerous to act alone when everyone is sleeping! I told you to let us know even if you're going to the bathroom!
...Let me go home...
Go home... to your house!? Alone!? No way, what are you think--

Shhh…
Your voice is too loud.
Did ya forget something?
Well, something like that... Is there no way you'll let me...?
No~~~, hmmm~~~... Mumumum...
Then, I'll go with you too! If you absolutely have to go back!
...Tch, it can't be helped... Come along then...
That's my house over there. I'll be right back, you wait outside.
Why are you just casually following me!!!

...No need to worry. That thing can't move anyway...
I'm home…

…O…
G…
Um... I-Is she...
Yeah... It's a shadow... of my wife, Kaoru...
Exactly two months ago... She... went out to the field alone... And came back as a <color=#GF_TIPS_016>shadow</color>.
When I was bathed in that light, I remembered immediately. That day 14 years ago... when Ryunosuke was killed.

I impulsively used the nail gun that was lying there...
...Gu... Guauu! Aah!!
...What's wrong... She's acting strange... this is the first time...
I think your wife also received Haine's telepathy that made Chitose-san go crazy.

While preaching about making decisions to Shinpei, I was the one who couldn't do it...

…Please.
